subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath sent down the verses, manifested the clear proofs, created the Messengers and dispatched them unto His servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الایات و اظهر البینات و خلق الرسل و ارسلهم الی العباد
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @Muhammad; Islam
